response.justification: The candidate is a clearly experienced, versatile senior engineer with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD) and systems exposure, but their C++ experience is limited to an early-career role (NI LabWindows/CVI components) and a bachelor thesis project. Their recent decade centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS platforms rather than modern C++/STL, multi-threaded industrial systems, MQTT/IoT protocols, or IEC 62443 secure development. The role demands hands-on senior C++ depth and industrial cybersecurity familiarity that this profile does not demonstrate.
strengths: Long, senior-level engineering track record with strong testing and software craftsmanship culture
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, caching, event-driven Geo-Data platform)
Mentoring and knowledge-sharing background (workshops, courses, dojos) fits the mentorship expectation
concerns: C++/STL experience is dated and brief relative to a role centered on modern C++ development
No evidence of industrial automation, MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA protocols, or IEC 62443/SDL practices
Recent stack (TypeScript/Node, DLang, web) diverges from the role's core networked multi-threaded C++ focus

key_factors.factor: Strong senior engineering and mentoring background
